mano_cua.result_summary: Discord Data Package Explorer需要上传真实的Discord数据导出包(.zip)才能测试支付页面功能。无可用Discord数据包，页面仅显示首页上传入口，无法进入支付信息页面进行测试
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application requires uploading a real Discord data export package (.zip file) to access payment-related pages. Without a valid Discord data package, only the upload landing page is accessible. Cannot test payment modal/button interactions.
